title: ornithogalum decipiens
intro: Ornithogalum decipiens, also known as the autumn-flowering star of life, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asparagaceae family, native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ornithogalum decipiens include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's tubers or leaves can be dried, powdered, or made into a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
